claim.assertion: The Kani bounded model checking suite contains exactly 67 proofs: 50 in portcullis (crates/portcullis/src/kani.rs) and 17 in the constitutional kernel (crates/ck-kernel/src/kani.rs). Five of the portcullis proofs (labeled E1–E5) cover the two token-issuing paths — decide() and issue_approved_token() — proving that denied operations never produce tokens (E2), that token operation fields match the decision operation (E3), and that issue_approved_token() bypass is always audited (E4–E5).
claim.evidence: Count #[kani::proof] annotations in each file. E1–E5 are defined starting at line ~1630 in kani.rs with doc comments labeling each harness. proof_issue_approved_token_is_audited() (E4) and proof_approved_token_bypass_is_audited() (E5) cover issue_approved_token().
